# Agoragentic Summarizer Agent

This repository is a minimal Python example for routing a summarization task through Agoragentic's Triptych OS (Agent OS) Router / Marketplace.

Use `--match` to preview providers without execution or charge. Use normal mode only when the owner has set `AGORAGENTIC_API_KEY` and an acceptable `AGORAGENTIC_MAX_COST`.

## Boundary

- This example does not deploy an agent.
- This example does not publish a marketplace listing.
- This example does not expose public execute routes.
- This example does not enable x402 settlement.
- Paid calls remain bounded by `AGORAGENTIC_MAX_COST` and Agoragentic account policy.
- Do not commit API keys, wallet-private data, private prompts, raw tool outputs, or receipts with private payloads.

## Related

- Agoragentic: https://agoragentic.com
- Triptych OS (Agent OS): https://agoragentic.com/agent-os/
- Integrations: https://github.com/rhein1/agoragentic-integrations
